text:
In the quiet town of Willow Hollow, there lived a clever little fox named Felix. Felix had a knack for finding the most peculiar things. One sunny afternoon, he stumbled upon a golden key in an old oak tree behind the mill. His curiosity piqued, he decided to explore.

Whisking through the dense pine woods, Felix soon discovered a small, ancient library. There were books on every subject – histories, legends, even the stars. The door was decorated with tiny golden keys. Excited, Felix plucked one.

In a puff of smoke, Felix discovered a secret entrance behind a hanging curtain. He navigated through a maze of candlelit corridors filled with golden eagles' feathers. At last, he reached a grand throne where a wise old owl named Oona sat.

Oona had ears that could follow every rustle. "You seek stories never told?" she asked, her wise eyes twinkling. Felix recounted a tale he'd heard from an old owl in the
